name: Shopify
description: Access your Shopify store's products, orders, and customer data. Update the base URL in Settings to your store domain (your-store.myshopify.com/admin/api/2024-07).

auth.hint: Create a Custom App in Shopify Admin → Settings → Apps → Develop Apps, then install it and copy the Admin API Access Token.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products in your Shopify store with title, price, inventory, and status.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status: active, archived, or draft

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get full details for a product including all variants and images.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List store orders with customer info, total price, and fulfillment status.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter: open, closed, cancelled, or any

params.name: financial_status
params.description: Payment status: paid, pending, refunded, etc.

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: ISO date — orders created after this date

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get full details for an order including line items, shipping, and payment info.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers with their email, order count, and total spending.
